inputs.srepr: Mul(Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)), Add(Mul(Symbol('K_A', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Derivative(Function('A')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(1))), Integer(2))), Mul(Symbol('beta', positive=True, real=True), Function('A')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Function('rho')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))))

output.srepr: Mul(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Add(Mul(Integer(-1), Integer(2), Symbol('K_A', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('A')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))), Mul(Integer(-1), Integer(4), Symbol('K_A', positive=True, real=True), Derivative(Function('A')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)), Tuple(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(1)))), Mul(Symbol('beta', positive=True, real=True), Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Function('rho')(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True)))))

method: Euler-Lagrange of r^2*(K_A*(A')^2+beta*rho*A) with spherical measure
